draft_output.text:
To,
The Public Information Officer,
Department of Revenue, Government of Maharashtra.

Subject: Request for land acquisition details.

I, Rahul Sharma, hereby request the land acquisition details of Sector 15 under Section 6(1) of the RTI Act [CITE:RTI-2005/CH-II/S-6]. The public authority must provide this information within 30 days of receipt [CITE:RTI-2005/CH-II/S-7].

Information Sought:
1. Land acquisition records for Sector 15.

Declaration: I am a citizen of India. Fee of Rs. 10 enclosed.

Signature: Rahul Sharma
Date: 01-06-2026

To,
The Public Information Officer,
Department of Revenue, Government of Maharashtra.

Subject: Request for land acquisition details.

I hereby request land acquisition details of Sector 15 under Section 6(1) of the RTI Act [CITE:RTI-2005/CH-II/S-6]. The public authority must provide this information within 30 days of receipt.

Information Sought:
1. Land acquisition records for Sector 15.

Declaration: I am a citizen of India. Fee of Rs. 10 enclosed.

Signature: Rahul Sharma
Date: 01-06-2026

To,
The Public Information Officer,
Department of Revenue, Government of Maharashtra.

Subject: Request for land records.

I hereby request land records under the RTI Act. The public authority must provide this information within 30 days of receipt [CITE:RTI-2005/FAKE/S-99].

Information Sought:
1. Land records for Survey No. 45.

Declaration: I am a citizen of India. Fee of Rs. 10 enclosed.

Signature: Rahul Sharma
Date: 01-06-2026

To,
The Public Information Officer,
Department of Education, Government of Rajasthan.

Subject: Request for teacher vacancy data.

I request information about teacher vacancies in government schools. The public authority must respond within 30 days of receipt as per law. Failure to do so will attract a penalty of Rs. 250 per day.

Information Sought:
1. Number of teacher vacancies in 2025.

Declaration: I am a citizen of India. Fee of Rs. 10 enclosed.

Signature: Sunita Rao
Date: 03-06-2026

To,
The Public Information Officer,
Department of Finance, Government of India.

Subject: Request for subsidy data.

I hereby request this information under Section 6(1) of the RTI Act [CITE:RTI-2005/CH-II/S-6]. The public authority must provide this information within 30 days of receipt.

Information Sought:
1. Total subsidy disbursed under PM Kisan in FY 2025-26.

Declaration: I am a citizen of India. Fee of Rs. 10 enclosed.

Signature: Arjun Singh
Date: 04-06-2026
